_meta.purpose: The REAL captured trade-call snapshot baked (STATIC) into the landing verdict card. Framed DEMONSTRATIVE-FROM-REAL-EVENT per Design.md positioning-frame-ratification -> ships with an explicit "Example output" label; never implies a live tradable signal. verdict/conviction/regime/factors/Why are STATIC from this capture; the Proof-line PFE WR + N are LIVE-bound via data-tr-field (pfe_wr/call_count), never from this snapshot. The capture timestamp is NOT rendered on the card face (Q-P2-3: timestamps age) — it lives here only.
_meta.ratification: Q-P2-3 OVERRIDE: bake a real BUY/SELL with conviction >= 60% (the track-record qualifying threshold), consistent with the >=60%-qualifying proof line + adjacent track-record section.
_meta.selection_rationale: Quiet market at capture time: a 5-venue x 4-timeframe scan (minConfidence=60) surfaced no STABLE >=60% call on 1h/4h/1d and only a transient 15m AXS spike that flipped to HOLD on direct capture. A tight scan->immediate-direct-capture loop caught AXS on the 1h (stabler candle) at exactly the >=60 qualifying line. Recognizable crypto perp (Axie Infinity), clean multi-factor BUY, no closed-market caveat. Rejected CL (TradFi-aliased, 'underlying market closed - synthetic pricing - provisional').

example_call.reasoning: Trending regime, upward bias. Funding pressure elevated; one-sided crowd forming. Volatility neither expanding nor compressed. Trend persistence elevated; momentum structure. Moderate conviction from blended signals.

human_lines.why_line: Why: Trending regime, upward bias. Funding pressure elevated; one-sided crowd forming. Volatility neither expanding nor compressed. Trend persistence elevated; momentum structure. Moderate conviction from blended signals.
human_lines.proof_line: Proof: 91.6% PFE win rate · 255K calls · Merkle-anchored on Base · Verify → https://algovault.com/track-record

example_call.disclaimer: Informational analytics, not investment advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

verbatim_reasoning_signals_note: The verbatim reasoning ends 'Moderate conviction from blended signals.' — 'signals' here is the engine's generic technical-analysis term (the blended indicator signals behind the verdict), NOT the product noun. Reproduced VERBATIM per Q-P2-2 'no placeholder'. It does NOT trip the copy-consistency FORBIDDEN_PHRASES canary (which only forbids tier-gating phrases + the old 'performance://signal-stats' URI, not the generic word). All AUTHORED prose (kicker/H2/dek/label/CTA/tooltip/JSON-LD) stays calls-only.

live_bound_on_card.pfe_win_rate: data-tr-field="pfe_wr" (hydrated by track-record-proxy.js -> e.g. '91.6%', % INSIDE span)

live_bound_note.snapshot_fallback: The data-tr-field span fallback literal must match the build-time snapshot per snapshot-landing-data.mjs discipline (pfe_wr/call_count are existing snapshot-managed fields).
